title: JKG® 50 x SAFETY PINS Assorted Sizes - Small Medium Large Safety Pins For Clothes - Perfect for Arts Crafts Sewing Hemming Textile Fabric Baby Clothing - Strong Nickel Plated Craft Pins
features: ✅50 PIECE SET - With 50 assorted safety pins, this set is perfect for crafting enthusiasts, providing a versatile and reliable solution for jewellery making, clothing alterations, and various projects. Upgrade your crafting essentials with these silver metal safety pins.
✅ASSORTED SIZES - The 50 x SAFETY PINS set provides small, medium, and large sizes in a 50-piece quantity, perfect for diverse tasks like arts, crafts, sewing, hemming, and securing baby clothing.

✅MULTI PURPOSE - These nickel-plated safety pins are a versatile crafting essential for various projects, including jewellery making, clothing, baby clothing, sewing, sewing, dressmaking, and first aid, ensuring a secure and reliable hold.
✅SNAG RESISTANT - Enjoy a snag-resistant experience with the smooth nickel-plated finish, enhancing durability and providing a seamless application for all your crafting and sewing needs.
✅BABY CLOTHING - Specifically designed for baby clothing, these safety pins offer a secure hold without compromising safety, making them a reliable choice for parents and caregivers.
description: Elevate your crafting and sewing projects with the JKG 50 x SAFETY PINS Assorted Sizes. This versatile set includes small, medium, and large safety pins in a convenient 50-piece quantity, catering to a range of tasks from arts and crafts to sewing, hemming, and securing baby clothing. Crafted with a snag-resistant nickel-plated finish, these safety pins ensure a smooth application for a seamless crafting experience. A must-have crafting essential, these pins are perfect for jewelry making, dressmaking, and even first aid. Specifically designed for baby clothing, they provide a secure hold without compromising safety, making them a reliable choice for parents and caregivers. With this convenient 50-piece set, whether you're a seasoned crafter or a beginner, upgrade your crafting essentials with the durability and versatility of JKG safety pins.
